title: Surgeon Vacancy at Vijaya Diagnostics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Vijaya Diagnostics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Vijaya Diagnostics in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vijaya Diagnostics:
Vijaya Diagnostics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics!
